task_summaries.task_scope: Measure linear correlation coefficients for packet length, segment size, flag counts, and packet count features across classes and time windows using evidence refs e13 to e22.
Analyze dependency concentration profiles for involved feature pairs to assess stability and class/time consistency using evidence refs e13 to e22.
Test shortcut-like predictive power of individual features within correlated pairs to identify potential shortcut signals using evidence refs e13 to e22.
Check redundancy impact on feature prioritization by verifying feature relations and duplication effects among correlated features using evidence refs e13 to e22.
